## edu-cli learning-plan edit

Update a learning plan (更新学习计划，自动记录新版本)

```
edu-cli learning-plan edit [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --comment string   Version comment
      --content string   New plan content
  -h, --help             help for edit
      --id uint          Learning plan ID (required)
```
